# Offstage

> Primary-source research on Zenza Capital, RYO Coin, RYO-CHAN, Club Sparkle, Anthony Diaz, and Lani Dizon. Published in English, Japanese, and Tagalog (Philippines).

## English

- [Home](https://offstage-archive.org/)
- [Anthony Diaz](https://offstage-archive.org/people/anthony-diaz/)
- [Lani Dizon](https://offstage-archive.org/people/lani-dizon/)
- [Manipulation tactics](https://offstage-archive.org/tactics/)
- [FAQ](https://offstage-archive.org/faq/)
- [Verify yourself](https://offstage-archive.org/sources/)

## Japanese

- [ホーム](https://offstage-archive.org/ja/)
- [ラニ・ディゾン](https://offstage-archive.org/ja/people/lani-dizon/)
- [手口](https://offstage-archive.org/ja/tactics/)
- [よくある質問](https://offstage-archive.org/ja/faq/)
